differential_diagnoses: Pulmonary veno-occlusive disease (PVOD) / Pulmonary capillary hemangiomatosis (PCH)
Systemic sclerosis (sine scleroderma) with pulmonary arterial hypertension
next_steps: Immediate referral to a high-volume lung transplant center
Genetic counseling and testing for EIF2AK4 (associated with hereditary PVOD)
Careful management of pulmonary congestion, keeping in mind the risk of pulmonary edema with pulmonary vasodilators
Discontinue or significantly reduce epoprostenol titration given previous clinical decline
Consider brief, cautious trial of high-dose corticosteroids if inflammatory vasculitis is suspected
In-depth review of hepatic pathology and portal venous system imaging to rule out occult portal hypertension or cirrhosis
